mission.title: kpt: Provide a way to ignore files or directories
mission.description: Provide a way to ignore files or directories. Requested by 16+ users.

steps.title: Check kpt installation
steps.description:
Verify your kpt installation:
```bash
kpt version
```
Install if needed: see https://kpt.dev/installation/. kpt is a Kubernetes package management CLI.

steps.title: Review kpt configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant kpt configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kpt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kpt
kubectl get configmap -n kpt -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kpt
```
We have legacy helm/ directories in our project that cause kpt parsing errors due to Go templates in the yaml files.

We'd like to be able to tell Kpt to ignore sub-directories.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Provide a way to ignore files or directories
steps.description:
Hi,
Let me add few more cases

1. `kpt pkg get` will download ALL files in the repository. This is not cool at all.
e.g. I may have my IDE files inside, some scripts, Makefiles, Markdown, etc.
WA: move Kptfile and everything to separate folder and don't put there any other resources.
This doesn't
```yaml
kind: PodChaos
apiVersion: chaos-mesh.org/v1alpha1
metadata:
  namespace: $(params.namespace)
  name: pod-kill
spec:
  selector:
    namespaces:
      - $(params.namespace)
    labelSelectors:
      app.kubernetes.io/component: master
      app.kubernetes.io/name: redis
  mode: one
  action: pod-kill
  gracePeriod: 0
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kpt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kpt
kubectl get events -n kpt --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Provide a way to ignore files or directories" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Hi,
Let me add few more cases

1. `kpt pkg get` will download ALL files in the repository. This is not cool at all.
e.g. I may have my IDE files inside, some scripts, Makefiles, Markdown, etc.
WA: move Kptfile and everything to separate folder and don't put there any other resources.
codeSnippets:
kind: PodChaos
apiVersion: chaos-mesh.org/v1alpha1
metadata:
  namespace: $(params.namespace)
  name: pod-kill
spec:
  selector:
    namespaces:
      - $(params.namespace)
    labelSelectors:
      app.kubernetes.io/component: master
      app.kubernetes.io/name: redis
  mode: one
  action: pod-kill
  gracePeriod: 0

apiVersion: kpt.dev/v1
kind: Kptfile
metadata:
  name: example
pipeline:
  pkg:
    - function: ignore
      configMap:
        resources:
          - '*.iml'
          - '*.idea'
          - 'Makefile'

apiVersion: kpt.dev/v1
kind: Kptfile
metadata:
  name: example
pipeline:
  live:
    - image: gcr.io/kpt-fn/ignore
      configMap:
        group: chaos-mesh.org

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with kpt installed or the issue environment reproducible.
